chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-602 of 2023 (Bashir Ahmed Vs. The State & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of MA No. 4979/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 13-12-2023. Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, advocate for the private respondent. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ******** 1. Over ruled. 2&3. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application has impugned order dated 26-08-2023 passed by learned IVth Additional Session Judge (Hudood)/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur, whereby he has directed the police to record statement of the private respondent at his verbatim for purpose of FIR. The injuries sustained by one of the injured in the instant case are cognizable in its nature; the registration of FIR in such like case could not be prevented under any circumstance. In such situation learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace by directing the police to record statement of private respondent for purpose of FIR by way of impugned order has committed no wrong, which could be made right by this Court by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application, it is dismissed accordingly. Judge Nasim/P.A
